queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with borrowers lacking a checking account and their contribution to increased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into how a negative checking account balance functions as a credit risk driver that mitigates default probability.
Empirical analysis of loan duration in months as a determinant of default and its role in reducing overall credit risk exposure.
